mapper.select: select category_id, shop_id, parent_id, name, path, status, icon, img_url, level, seq from category where category_id = #{categoryId} and status != -1
select category_id, shop_id, parent_id, name, path, status, icon, img_url, level, seq from category where shop_id = #{shopId} and status != -1 order by seq asc, category_id asc

select category_id, shop_id, parent_id, name, path, status, icon, img_url, level, seq from category where shop_id = #{shopId} and parent_id = #{parentId} and status != -1 order by seq asc, category_id asc
mapper.insert: insert into category (shop_id, parent_id, name, path, status, icon, img_url, level, seq) values (#{shopId}, #{parentId}, #{name}, #{path}, #{status}, #{icon}, #{imgUrl}, #{level}, #{seq})
mapper.update: update category set name = #{name}, status = #{status}, icon = #{icon}, img_url = #{imgUrl}, seq = #{seq}, path = #{path}, level = #{level} where category_id = #{categoryId}
update category set status = -1 where category_id = #{categoryId}
mapper.select: select count(1) from category where parent_id = #{categoryId} and status != -1
